testing_progress.highlight: Glamsterdam devnet-7 active; testing payload withholding, PTC blob votes, and builder gas limit override issues
PTC votes for blobs not considered when payload is absent; should be independent liveness check — clients investigating
Prysm Beacon API performance issue: builder-0 payload propagation delayed ~2s despite on-time release; fixed
Devnet-7 only has ~3,000 active validators; insufficient to benchmark SSZ stable container performance; devnet-8 will increase count

fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: Soft deadline Monday (ACDT) to finalize Beacon API / builder API changes; devnet-8 targeting early August
Testing teams intend to SFI all EIPs included in devnet-7; no objections raised
Timeline: devnet-8 early August, public + non-finality devnets in August, first testnet targeting September

client_updates.highlight: Circuit breaker status: Nimbus implemented (Fusaka version only, not Glamsterdam); Lighthouse and Grandine not yet implemented; Prysm targeting devnet-8; Teku merged PR
Prysm devnet-7 peering issue: nodes isolated due to invalid payloads floating around; simple restart resolves sync

eip_proposals_hegota.highlight: EIP-11905 (Bundled Attestation Propagation): deduplicates attestation data to save bandwidth; backwards-compatible, no fork required; draft Prysm impl exists; proposed for Hegota
EIP-11936 (Partial Execution Payload Commitments): alternative to late-state-root (EIP-7862); ePBS bid commits to all EL header fields except state root instead of block hash; presented for Hegota

action_items.action: Review beacon-APIs PR #630 (ahead-of-time builder preferences endpoint); more client teams needed
Finalize Beacon API / builder API / key manager API changes by Monday ACDT for devnet-8 readiness

decisions.decision: SFI all EIPs included in Glamsterdam devnet-7; PRs to be created
EIP-11905 (Bundled Attestation Propagation) to be made required at Hegota fork even though backwards-compatible
PFI for Hegota: EIP-11905 (Bundled Attestation Propagation)

targets.target: Beacon API spec changes finalized — Monday ACDT (late July 2026)
